title: Object 101
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Object 101: "The Voidstone"}} {{Blurbackground|file=SPACE.jpg}}
[[File:Rainbow glitter.gif|1500px]]

The One That Fuels All

The Voidstone is not one, but all. It is everything The Backrooms has known. It is everything. Every resource, every thought. Made from this. [[The Void]] is just its liquid form. Once, there was nothing but a stone. It expanded, grew, transformed. It recolored itself into everything you see. It changed materials, soft, paper, rock. The levels are connected by it. Built from it. It is inescapable. The stone is untouched. Buried in the deepest pits of the void, impossible to reach. It bends and twists, something new every time. It can destroy or create at a whim. It will never be seen. Somewhere out there, the heart exists. Fueling it all. Branching off in hundreds of directions, to every level ever discovered and more. It is a web of imagination. A web of existence. It never sleeps, nor awakens. And so, it may return to a state above all, as it is God. A god that controls all, sees all, and thinks all. It is otherworldly. It is not a thing. It is a '''one'''.

The Heart

The heart is out there, somewhere. The mother of The Backrooms. It has no shape, nor sense. It is simply there, watching, observing. It changes and it warps into what it wants. Sometimes it makes a new level, sometimes it removes one. The heart is incomprehensible. Only it can truly understand. It has power beyond an imagination. It is one, yet all. From the day it began, to the day it ends. It is control, order, life. A god. The power it holds is unlike any other. It thinks what is real. Reality is merely its thoughts. Unimaginable yet so simple. This being is both existent and non-existent. It defies all logic. Everything was built around, is, it. It is like [[Object 101-A|The Holystone]], the one that created [[The Frontrooms]], but it didn't stop at one. It kept going. One, two, three, then a thousand more. When it ran out, it went the other way.

The Veins

The Veins connect every level to one another. They are the sole reason why one can no-clip here in the first place. A wanderer can no-clip to another level through them, but they do not all lead to one another. They are like wires powering a city. Without them, it would be dark, alone. They help but also hurt. They can take one from a safe level to a dangerous one, or vice versa. These veins are like those in the human body, yet instead of organs, there are levels. Infinite expanses of dismay and fear, or happiness and tranquility. They are like red strings on a corkboard. ''"Sometimes, your greatest enemies turn out to be your friend. They leave you in a situation, and fix it."'' It is all, including you, {{USERNAME}}. You are it, it is you. Yet you will never understand. {{Audio|align=middle|=yes|loop=yes|file=Mallmusicnew.mp3|volume=1|secrettext=It Is All}}
